title: Receptionist cum Administrative Officer
description:
Our client, a well-established manufacturing company located in Jurong, is currently looking for a Receptionist cum Administrative Officer to be the first point of contact for visitors and callers, while also supporting general administrative and office coordination duties.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Manage front desk and reception duties, including call handling, visitor coordination, paging, and meeting room control
  • Handle incoming and outgoing mail, parcels, courier arrangements, and ensure accurate distribution and dispatch
  • Maintain reception, mail room, and showroom display screens in proper working condition
  • Coordinate and raise requisitions for office supplies
  • Perform general administrative support including billing records, HR document filing, payroll verification support, access card management, and courier tracking
  • Provide ad-hoc administrative and office support duties as assigned

Job Requirements:

  • Min GCE "O" levels and above
  • At least 1 year of customer service or receptionist experience

Other Information:

  • Mondays to Fridays, 0740am to 1700pm
  • Joo Koon / Pioneer MRT

Interested applicants, please email to agnes.ng@persolapac.com or WhatsApp to 97294098

Thank you for your interest but only shortlisted applicants will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to P-Serv Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.p-serv.com.sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
P-Serv is one of Singapore’s most established HR solutions providers. We are the local leader in providing business process outsourcing solutions in projects related to customer service management, collections management and payroll administration. We also provide temporary and contract placements that fits the business needs and requirements of our clients.


Founded in 1990 and acquired by Kelly Services Singapore (Now PERSOLKELLY Singapore) in 2007, we have a proven track record across various different industries and have established long-term partnerships with some of Singapore’s finest local companies and key government agencies.
